title: poa multicaulis
intro: Poa multicaulis, also known as many-stemmed meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to China and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Poa multicaulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
